LAW AND MOTION 302, THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE BY THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT DEBTOR JEFF JOHNSTON'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. (THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY FUNDS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.) (COURT SHALL PREPARE THE ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TONY TENG'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption IS Off calendar. It appears this matter was calendared in error, since the claim was already decided on February 1, 2013. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Hrg On Claim Of Exemption (Amended); Opposition
Off Calendar Feb-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Tony Teng, Tel. 415.613.3978, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: Hearing was required in this matter for judgment debtor to bring bank statement(s) or documentation to support his claim. There being no appearance by the judgment debtor, the court ruled as follows: JUDGMENT DEBTOR JEFF JOHNSTON'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is denied. (The levying officer is directed to release any funds held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment.) (Court shall prepare the order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
